reviews.review_description: I like the game a lot, but there are a lot of bugs. Form templates cannot be used properly, e.g. you cannot grip properly with the controllers. Please bring bug fixes, then you'll get 5 stars

I absolutely loved the PC version of this, so I also bought the quest version. I’m pretty disappointed and will return this app to get my money back. There are glitches and bugs; for example, my controllers don’t show up. Instead there is just text instead of my hands. The floor isn’t the right height. I can’t turn off tunnel vision when walking. The cursor disappears when trying to click the back button of the settings menu. I could go on and on about this, but the short version is: don’t get this game. Buy the PC version on steam.

Yes the game is buggy, and yes there are areas that need working on. Devs your smart enough to build something awesome on the pc, so keep developing this game. I know y’all got more in yah to keep your customers happy. 😁👍🏽

This game is cool and all, But there’s a lot of glitches, I have it 5 stars cause it is fun and cool, But why can’t it be like painting Vr, I have the game it it’s way more polished, I don’t wanna have to press trigger to paint, Dev, Please respond to this review and say when your gonna update the game and add achievements, Cause getting endings are useless, and I own the game on pc.

I don’t think this app is ready for shipping. 
Toolbox UI is too close - you will have hard time to look at informations. Controller interaction in consistence - Sometimes Trigger is for activating, Sometimes grab button. Horrible Low resolution even in Quest3 - Especially for painting canvas. Other many low quality UX disappointed me.

I had a high hope for this game. So sad.
